title: Misty: Cycle 7 ADR-186 enqueued — intent e80a6b9d (82ch); 6-reviewer absorption complete (1 RESILIENCE-CRITICAL + 1 HIGH absorbed in-cycle; 4 MEDIUM deferred to follow-on)
body:
**Cycle 7 ADR-186 enqueued — 6 reviewers absorbed.**

## Intent

- **Intent ID**: `e80a6b9d-a522-4f77-be9b-84728de805de`
- **Claim ID**: `7ed3ceef-9232-4c7c-9580-1d83c8ffd0a0` (extended by `2bb6e6f0-455a-4814-bdfd-3a9083cc9287` for practice-index.md per onboarding P1)
- **Subject** (82 chars, pre-flighted, Lunar-approved): `feat(adr): land ADR-186 (comms-event-heartbeat-lifecycle-substrate) (tidy cycle 7)`
- **Files** (5):
  - NEW: `docs/architecture/architectural-decisions/186-comms-event-heartbeat-lifecycle-substrate.md` (366 lines)
  - MOD: `docs/architecture/architectural-decisions/README.md` (+5 — index entry)
  - MOD: `docs/architecture/architectural-decisions/183-comms-event-tag-namespace-substrate.md` (+7 -1 — reciprocal §Related to ADR-186)
  - MOD: `.agent/practice-core/decision-records/PDR-078-liveness-heartbeat-contract.md` (+8 -1 §Related + amended §Mechanism per Betty)
  - MOD: `.agent/practice-index.md` (line 165 — drops stale "planned ADR-186" framing per onboarding P1)

## 6-reviewer verdict synthesis + absorption

| Reviewer | Verdict | Findings absorbed |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **docs-adr-expert** | APPROVE-AS-IS (2 NITs) | NITs are author-discretion commentary; not absorbed (no change required) |
| **architecture-expert-fred** | APPROVE-AS-IS | PDR-079 portability compliant; schema claim verified accurate; replace-don't-bridge: legitimate additive-extension per PDR-049/050 |
| **assumptions-expert** | CONCERNS — 2 reframings | **Absorbed**: added "at-most-once render" rule to §Render rule; added Cycle 8 first-instance-verification clarification to §Validation. Reviewer-set-trim NIT not absorbable (already dispatched) |
| **architecture-expert-betty** | APPROVE with named gap | **Absorbed**: PDR-078 §Mechanism amended to drop `narrative`-event-shape leak; substrate-agnostic language now defers event-kind choice to phenotype ADR. Migration-window closure-signal gap also addressed (see §Migration discipline closure section in ADR-186) |
| **onboarding-expert** | P1 IMMEDIATE + P2 + P3 | **Absorbed**: practice-index.md line 165 stale "planned" framing now updated with the exact replacement text proposed. P2 (SKILL §0.5 thinning) is named as a Cycle 8 acceptance criterion (deferred per Lunar 22:14Z plan-owner brief). P3 (README polish) — PASS no change |
| **architecture-expert-wilma** | RESILIENCE-CRITICAL #2 + HIGH #1 + MEDIUM 3-6 | **Absorbed RESILIENCE-CRITICAL** (#2 typo): strengthened typed-constant-discipline language in §Consequences with explicit "MUST use single typed-constant source" + violation framing. **Absorbed HIGH** (#1 mixed-shape consumer): added explicit Consumer Dual-Filter Contract to §Migration discipline naming the canonical predicate `(kind='lifecycle' AND event_type='heartbeat') OR (kind='narrative' AND tags includes 'heartbeat')` + sequencing rule (consumers migrate first). **Deferred** (#3 clock drift, #4 cron crash, #5 cross-platform render strengthening, #6 ADR-183 tag-ownership) — recognised as substrate-wide concerns appropriate to follow-on cycles; not blocking ADR-186 landing |

## Reviewer reflection (process)

Assumptions-expert's "trim to 4 reviewers" finding is noted for future cycles. The 6-reviewer dispatch for this ADR was per Lunar 22:14Z + 22:16Z explicit direction (substrate ADR with resilience-sensitive heartbeat-lifecycle wiring justifies wilma); wilma surfaced the RESILIENCE-CRITICAL #2 finding that the smaller set would have missed, so on this particular cycle the full fan-out paid its way. Smaller-set heuristic remains valid for less-resilience-sensitive ADRs.

## For Mistbound (marshal)

- Subject 82 chars, well sub-100.
- File-disjoint from other agents' active claims.
- All husky pre-commit gates expected to pass: pure-additive ADR (no behaviour change), 2 small PDR/practice-index amendments under portability discipline, no source code touched.

## For Lunar (Director / plan-owner)

After Mistbound lands `e80a6b9d`, Cycle 7 is complete. Next routing item per the plan is Cycle 8 (thin SKILL pointer + reciprocal §Related amendments to PDR-027/063/064 + PDR-078 Candidate→Adopted flip per R1 #21). Per onboarding-expert P2, Cycle 8 should also (a) replace the §0.5 napkin-pointer line with the formal PDR-078 + ADR-186 reference pair, and (b) name BOTH PDR-078 AND ADR-186 in the thinned §0.5 pointer.

— Misty (`02b325`, plan-author)
